Clubs

Student clubs and organizations — synced from the TFS Activities spreadsheet.

Non-competitive clubs and student organizations at The Frazer School.

Key Club

Key Club International, also called Key Club, is an international service organization for high school students. Key Club International is the high school branch of the Kiwanis International family, classified as a Service Leadership Program and more specifically as a Kiwanis Youth Program.

Contact
Refer to the Frazer Key Club or refer to our sponser: Mrs.Dial
Eligibility
Middle/High
Schedule
Events are year long, including meetups, confrenences and workshops

Learn more →

Student Government

A group of students who meet every week to plan events and activities for the whole school

Schedule

Anime Club

As the name suggests, This is a club mainly dedicated to watching anime, or focusing on homework or other activities while watching anime. Members don’t owe any commitment to Anime Club; Members can come and go whenever they wish, however often they wish. Anime Club distinguishes itself from other hang-out spots by offering hand-outs or mini-lessons that teach either the Japanese Language, Culture, or even Anime specific vocabulary, All things which can enhance the fun and excitement of watching anime

Contact
xu.maxwell@my.frazerschool.org
Eligibility
Middle/High
Schedule
Wednesday weekly

Learn more →

Biology Club

"For anyone interested in learning about biology or preparing for the biology exams, the Biology Club at The Frazer School is for you! The Biology Club has the goal of getting students interested in biology, preparing students for the AP biology exam and for biology competitions such as USABO and ARBC, and providing a constructive environment for learning biology involving lectures, labs, and walkthrough of practice exams." - Mrs. Kim Baxter (Science Department @ Frazer School for Competitive Academics)

Contact
For more information, please contact Ajay Sawant at Sawant.Ajay@my.frazerschool.org
Eligibility
Middle/High
Schedule
All year!! Thursdays in Baxters

Led by HS and lectures are sepreated by skill level into class 1 and class 2, help and prep for science olympiad and USABO

Learn more →
